1. When did the Allahabad University CUET NCET 4 Year Integrated Course Admissions Online Form 2026 start?
The online application process for Allahabad University UG Admissions 2026 started on 05 July 2026.

The last date to submit the online application form is 15 July 2026 .

Candidates can pay the application fee up to 15 July 2026 .

The Counselling will be Start As per Schedule by the Allahabad University.

If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
